habitat: Cool mountain streams of Japan; difficult cultivation.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary pungent condiment; traditional Japanese accompaniment to raw fish.
traditionalUsesDe: Scharfes Würzmittel der japanischen Küche; traditionell zu rohem Fisch.
activeCompounds: Isothiocyanates (allyl isothiocyanate related compounds from glucosinolates)
preparation: Freshly grated rhizome; many commercial pastes are horseradish-based substitutes.
cautions: Pungent vapors irritate eyes and sinuses. Food use only.
historicalNotes: True wasabi scarce and prized; often replaced by dyed horseradish abroad.
